evals.prompt: B55X80C350 這個斷面名稱代表什麼？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader-elements. Explain: B=beam, 55=width(cm), 80=depth(cm), C350=concrete grade fc'=350.

evals.prompt: 圖上有個斜撐構件要怎麼處理？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader-elements. Reference Section IV: use BRACE in ETABS, not COLUMN. Need precise start/end coordinates.

evals.prompt: 這個案子有三棟共構，下構比上構大，最外邊不在 Grid Line 上，要怎麼處理？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger plan-reader-elements. Reference Section V case 2: calculate extension distance proportionally, no columns at outer edge.
